message:
test(base91): expand from 61 to 82 tests for basE91 encoding/decoding (wa-3bd6x)

Add 21 new tests covering: high-byte decoding skip behavior,
ENCTAB exclusion chars (single quote, backslash, dash), DECTAB
inverse validation, power-of-two boundaries, 13-byte encoder
threshold, alternating FF/00 patterns, concatenation independence,
single/two-char decode with flush, empty write behavior, 50KB
pseudo-random roundtrip, val-88 threshold boundary, purity
guarantees for encode/decode, ENCTAB alphabet structure verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
